sentences.sentence: Despite possessing vibrant purple flowers and being attractive to the eye, the water hyacinth has often been referred to as the most problematic aquatic plant in the world's waters.
sentences.translation: 尽管水葫芦有鲜艳的紫色花朵，外形也十分悦目，但它常被称为世界水域中问题最严重的水生植物。

structure.text: Despite possessing vibrant purple flowers and being attractive to the eye
has often been referred to as
the most problematic aquatic plant in the world's waters

difficult_points: Despite 后接 possessing 与 being 两个并列动名词，构成让步状语。
refer to A as B 的被动形式表示水葫芦被称作某种植物。

sentences.sentence: Due to its aesthetic appeal, water hyacinth, which is native to South America, has been distributed to many different regions and now thrives in the southern states of the USA and many subtropical and tropical locations.
sentences.translation: 由于具有观赏价值，原产南美洲的水葫芦被传播到许多不同地区，如今在美国南部各州以及众多亚热带和热带地区大量生长。

structure.text: which is native to South America
has been distributed to many different regions
and now thrives in the southern states of the USA and many subtropical and tropical locations

difficult_points: which 从句补充说明水葫芦原产地，主句需跨过该插入部分理解。
has been distributed 是被动语态，而 thrives 是主动谓语，两者由 and 并列。

sentences.sentence: It has also been observed to be relatively tolerant of cooler climates and is routinely sold as an ornamental plant for domestic use in a number of horticulture centres.
sentences.translation: 人们还发现它对较凉气候有相对较强的耐受力，许多园艺中心也经常把它作为家庭观赏植物出售。

structure.text: has also been observed to be relatively tolerant of cooler climates
and is routinely sold as an ornamental plant
for domestic use in a number of horticulture centres

difficult_points: has been observed to be 是被动报告结构，表示经观察发现具有某特性。
It 回指 water hyacinth；两个被动谓语 observed 与 sold 共用主语。

expressions.text: be sold as an ornamental plant

sentences.sentence: Though the hyacinth species is distinctive in appearance, another aquatic floating plant –water lettuce – is sometimes mistakenly identified as water hyacinth.
sentences.translation: 尽管水葫芦外形独特，另一种漂浮水生植物——水浮莲——有时仍会被误认成水葫芦。

structure.text: Though the hyacinth species is distinctive in appearance
is sometimes mistakenly identified as water hyacinth

difficult_points: Though 从句让步，说明即便外形有特点仍会发生误认。
两个短横线之间的 water lettuce 是主语 plant 的同位语；源文横线空格不规则，已保留。

sentences.sentence: Water lettuce, however, does not have the same attractive flowers, has larger leaves and is less tolerant of cooler climates.
sentences.translation: 然而，水浮莲没有同样漂亮的花朵，叶片更大，而且对较凉气候的耐受力更低。

structure.text: does not have the same attractive flowers
and is less tolerant of cooler climates

difficult_points: however 是插入的转折副词，不影响主句结构。
does not have、has 与 is 三个谓语并列，对比水浮莲和水葫芦。

sentences.sentence: Water hyacinth has rounded waxy, green leaves which grow up to around 6 inches in width and floating leaf stems which grow up to 12 inches in length.
sentences.translation: 水葫芦有圆形、蜡质的绿色叶片，宽度可达约6英寸；还有漂浮的叶柄，长度可达12英寸。

structure.text: which grow up to around 6 inches in width
which grow up to 12 inches in length

difficult_points: has 后有 leaves 与 leaf stems 两个并列宾语，各自由 which 从句说明尺寸。
in width 与 in length 分别表示宽度和长度维度。

sentences.sentence: Flowers are typically between 2 to 3 inches in width and as many as 15 flowers, each purple on the outside and containing a yellow centre, may grow from each plant.
sentences.translation: 花朵通常宽2至3英寸，每株植物最多可长出15朵花；每朵花外侧呈紫色，中心为黄色。

structure.text: Flowers are typically between 2 to 3 inches in width
each purple on the outside and containing a yellow centre

difficult_points: and 连接两个关于花朵尺寸和数量的独立信息。
each purple... 是独立补充结构，其中 purple 与 containing 并列描述单朵花。
as many as 强调数量最多可达15朵。

sentences.sentence: Many of the problems associated with the water hyacinth are due to its incredible growth and reproduction capabilities, which have made it difficult to control and allow it to quickly dominate the environment in which it grows and spreads.
sentences.translation: 水葫芦带来的许多问题源于其惊人的生长和繁殖能力；这些能力使它难以控制，并让它迅速主宰其生长扩散的环境。

structure.text: Many of the problems associated with the water hyacinth
are due to its incredible growth and reproduction capabilities
which have made it difficult to control
and allow it to quickly dominate the environment
in which it grows and spreads

difficult_points: associated... 修饰 problems；be due to 表示问题的成因。
which 回指 capabilities，并连接 have made 与 allow 两个结果。
make it difficult to control 中 it 可理解为形式宾语，同时语义上控制对象仍是 water hyacinth；in which 修饰 environment。

sentences.sentence: Its growth patterns are characterised by a rapid formation of an impenetrable vegetation mass; botanists say that one plant can produce around 5000 seeds and in one study two plants were observed to produce 1200 plants in as little as 4 months.
sentences.translation: 它的生长模式以迅速形成无法穿透的植被团块为特征；植物学家称，一株水葫芦可产生约5000粒种子，而一项研究观察到，两株水葫芦在短短4个月内繁殖出了1200株。

structure.text: Its growth patterns are characterised by a rapid formation of an impenetrable vegetation mass
that one plant can produce around 5000 seeds
and in one study two plants were observed to produce 1200 plants in as little as 4 months

difficult_points: 分号连接生长模式特征与具体繁殖数据。
say 后 that 从句包含由 and 连接的两组数据，第二组用 were observed to produce 被动报告结构。
as little as 4 months 强调所需时间短得惊人。

expressions.text: in as little as four months

sentences.sentence: Following nature's usual pattern, water hyacinth seeds are distributed outside of the immediate area by birds, fauna, wind and water currents, facilitating growth in surrounding areas previously free of the plant.
sentences.translation: 依照自然界通常的传播模式，水葫芦种子会被鸟类、其他动物、风和水流带到原生区域之外，从而促使它在周边原本没有这种植物的地区生长。

structure.text: are distributed outside of the immediate area by birds, fauna, wind and water currents

difficult_points: Following... 的逻辑主语是 seeds，表示种子传播符合自然规律。
by 后列出四类传播媒介；facilitating... 表示这种传播带来的结果。
previously free of the plant 修饰 areas，指原先不存在水葫芦的地区。

sentences.sentence: Domination of environments by water hyacinth populations has a number of negative implications.
sentences.translation: 水葫芦种群对环境的占据会带来许多负面影响。

structure.text: Domination of environments by water hyacinth populations

difficult_points: 长主语中心词是 Domination，of environments 是被控制对象，by... 是施动者。
implications 在此指实际后果，不是言外之意。

sentences.sentence: For humans, difficulties may be faced in getting boats through areas of rivers and lakes where the plant is present and fishing and swimming opportunities may be limited.
sentences.translation: 对人类而言，在水葫芦生长的河湖区域行船可能十分困难，捕鱼和游泳的机会也可能受限。

structure.text: in getting boats through areas of rivers and lakes
and fishing and swimming opportunities may be limited

difficult_points: difficulties may be faced 是被动表达，in doing 说明困难所在。
where 修饰 areas of rivers and lakes；and 后是另一完整被动分句。

sentences.sentence: However, the implications for the ecosystem of the immediate environment may be of even greater concern.
sentences.translation: 然而，对当地环境生态系统的影响可能更加令人担忧。

structure.text: the implications for the ecosystem of the immediate environment

difficult_points: for the ecosystem... 修饰 implications，说明影响的承受对象。
be of concern 相当于 be concerning，even greater 强化与人类影响的比较。

sentences.sentence: The density of the mass of water hyacinth populations can prevent adequate amounts of sunlight and oxygen reaching the water: as a result, significant numbers of fish may die, other species of plant growing below water level are compromised and the ecosystem of the immediate area can therefore become unbalanced.
sentences.translation: 密集成团的水葫芦种群会阻碍充足的阳光和氧气进入水体；结果，大量鱼类可能死亡，生长在水面以下的其他植物物种会受损，当地生态系统也会因此失去平衡。

structure.text: The density of the mass of water hyacinth populations
adequate amounts of sunlight and oxygen reaching the water
as a result, significant numbers of fish may die
other species of plant growing below water level are compromised
and the ecosystem of the immediate area can therefore become unbalanced

difficult_points: prevent + 名词 + doing 表示阻止阳光和氧气进入水中，reaching 的逻辑主语是 sunlight and oxygen。
冒号后由三个并列分句列出生态后果；growing below water level 修饰 plant。
be compromised 表示生存或功能受损；become unbalanced 描述生态系统失衡。

sentences.sentence: Furthermore, the conditions created by the presence of water hyacinth, while detrimental to most forms of life, are perfect for encouraging growth of deadly bacteria often found in poorly oxygenated areas of water.
sentences.translation: 此外，水葫芦存在所形成的环境虽然对大多数生命形式有害，却非常有利于致命细菌繁殖，而这类细菌常见于缺氧水域。

structure.text: the conditions created by the presence of water hyacinth
while detrimental to most forms of life
are perfect for encouraging growth of deadly bacteria
often found in poorly oxygenated areas of water

difficult_points: created by... 是过去分词修饰 conditions；while detrimental... 省略了 they are。
be perfect for 在此不是正面评价，而是说明这种条件非常适合细菌繁殖。
often found... 修饰 deadly bacteria，指出这类细菌常见环境。

expressions.text: be perfect for encouraging growth of

sentences.sentence: In the southern states of the USA, in Florida in particular, water hyacinth is now under maintenance control.
sentences.translation: 在美国南部各州，尤其是佛罗里达州，水葫芦目前处于持续管控之下。

structure.text: In the southern states of the USA

difficult_points: in Florida in particular 对前面的 southern states 作进一步具体化。
under maintenance control 指需要长期维持的控制状态，并非已被彻底根除。

sentences.sentence: The plant population can be limited in a number of ways: including use of herbicides, clearance equipment and bio-control insects.
sentences.translation: 可通过多种方式限制这种植物的数量，包括使用除草剂、清理设备和生物防治昆虫。

structure.text: including use of herbicides, clearance equipment and bio-control insects

difficult_points: can be limited 使用被动语态，强调数量可被控制。
冒号后的 including 短语列举三种控制手段。

sentences.sentence: However, efforts to minimise the population of water hyacinth need to be continual and consistent; experts warning that unless control methods are upheld, the problem can easily reoccur.
sentences.translation: 然而，减少水葫芦数量的努力必须持续且一贯；专家警告说，除非始终坚持控制措施，否则问题很容易再次出现。

structure.text: efforts to minimise the population of water hyacinth
need to be continual and consistent
that unless control methods are upheld

difficult_points: 分号后 experts warning 不是标准完整分句，而是原文省略式独立结构，需保留。
warning 的内容由 that 从句表达，其中又包含 unless 条件从句。
are upheld 表示控制措施被持续执行；reoccur 是原文拼法。

sentences.sentence: Some say inattention for as little as a twelve month period would allow numbers to quickly return to infestation level; hardly surprising given that the species is known to be able to double in as little as 12 days.
sentences.translation: 有人说，仅仅疏于管理十二个月，就会使其数量迅速恢复到成灾水平；鉴于这种植物已知能在短短12天内翻倍，这一点并不令人意外。

structure.text: inattention for as little as a twelve month period would allow numbers to quickly return to infestation level
given that the species is known to be able to double in as little as 12 days

difficult_points: say 后省略 that；inattention 是宾语从句主语，would allow... 是谓语。
分号后 hardly surprising 省略了 this is，作为对前述结果的评论。
given that 引出原因；is known to be able to double 是层叠的被动报告和能力结构。

expressions.text: double in as little as 12 days

sentences.sentence: Water hyacinth is thought to have been introduced into Africa in the 1800s; its presence at Lake Kyoga was first identified in 1988 and at Lake Victoria in 1989.
sentences.translation: 据认为，水葫芦于19世纪被引入非洲；1988年人们首次在基奥加湖发现它，1989年又在维多利亚湖发现。

structure.text: is thought to have been introduced into Africa in the 1800s

difficult_points: is thought to have been introduced 是被动报告结构加完成时不定式，表示引入早于当前判断。
and at Lake Victoria in 1989 省略了 its presence was identified。

expressions.text: be thought to have been introduced

sentences.sentence: In the mid 1990s, water hyacinth was estimated to dominate 10% of the latter lake's waters.
sentences.translation: 20世纪90年代中期，据估计水葫芦占据了后一个湖泊10%的水域。
difficult_points: was estimated to dominate 表示根据估算占据，而非精确测量。
the latter lake 指上一句后提到的 Lake Victoria。

sentences.sentence: However, by 1998, the plant was almost completely eliminated from East African waters; this being achieved predominantly by the use of bio-control insects, in this case snout beetles, a type of weevil which feeds only on the water hyacinth species of plant.
sentences.translation: 然而，到1998年，这种植物几乎已从东非水域清除；这主要依靠生物防治昆虫实现，本例中使用的是象鼻甲虫，即一种只取食水葫芦的象甲。

structure.text: was almost completely eliminated from East African waters
this being achieved predominantly by the use of bio-control insects
a type of weevil which feeds only on the water hyacinth species of plant

difficult_points: 分号后 this being achieved 是独立主格，this 回指几乎清除水葫芦这一结果。
snout beetles 具体说明 bio-control insects，a type of weevil 又是其同位语。
which 修饰 weevil，说明这种昆虫只取食水葫芦。

sentences.sentence: Tens of thousands of the weevils were distributed throughout the lake areas of East Africa, their habit of feeding on the leaves and laying their eggs in the plants' stalks eventually causing the plants to die and sink to the bottom of the lake.
sentences.translation: 数万只象甲被投放到东非各湖区；它们取食叶片并在植株茎内产卵的习性，最终导致水葫芦死亡并沉入湖底。

structure.text: Tens of thousands of the weevils
were distributed throughout the lake areas of East Africa
their habit of feeding on the leaves and laying their eggs in the plants' stalks
eventually causing the plants to die and sink to the bottom of the lake

difficult_points: 逗号后是独立主格：their habit 为逻辑主语，causing 为分词谓语。
feeding 与 laying 并列修饰 habit；cause + 宾语 + to do 表示导致植物死亡并下沉。

sentences.sentence: In addition, the plant population was removed using mechanical clearing equipment and by hand with the help of a machete.
sentences.translation: 此外，人们还使用机械清理设备，并借助砍刀手工清除这些植物。

structure.text: and by hand with the help of a machete

difficult_points: was removed 是被动语态，施动者未明说。
using equipment 与 by hand 并列两种清除方式；with the help of a machete 补充手工工具。

sentences.sentence: Despite earlier success, however, negative repercussions of human activity have caused the return of water hyacinth to East African waters.
sentences.translation: 然而，尽管此前治理成功，人类活动的负面后果仍使水葫芦重返东非水域。

structure.text: the return of water hyacinth to East African waters

difficult_points: Despite 与 however 同时强化转折，尽管语义略有重复但属原文表达。
cause the return of... 表示人类活动后果使入侵植物重新出现。

sentences.sentence: Uganda's Lake Kyoga, has recently once again experienced problems with infestation.
sentences.translation: 乌干达的基奥加湖最近再次遭遇水葫芦成灾问题。
difficult_points: 主语 Lake Kyoga 后的逗号属于源文异常，分析时不视为插入语边界。
recently 与 once again 分别强调时间近和问题复发。

sentences.sentence: Sewage and agricultural waste making their way into the waterways and thereby creating an excess of nutrients in the water have been the main contributing factors to the re-emergence of water hyacinth.
sentences.translation: 污水和农业废弃物流入水道，并由此造成水中营养物质过剩，已成为水葫芦卷土重来的主要促成因素。

structure.text: making their way into the waterways
and thereby creating an excess of nutrients in the water
the main contributing factors to the re-emergence of water hyacinth

difficult_points: making 与 creating 是并列分词，修饰 sewage and waste，主句谓语到 have been 才出现。
their 回指 sewage and agricultural waste；thereby 表示流入水道所造成的直接结果。

sentences.sentence: In addition, high levels of nitrogen in rainfall, which enters the water cycle from the smoke created by wood burning cooking fires used in the region, also serves as nutrition to the increasing plant population.
sentences.translation: 此外，降雨中的高浓度氮也会为不断增长的植物种群提供养分；这些氮由当地烧柴做饭产生的烟雾进入水循环。

structure.text: high levels of nitrogen in rainfall
which enters the water cycle from the smoke
created by wood burning cooking fires
also serves as nutrition to the increasing plant population

difficult_points: which 语义上回指 nitrogen，虽与较远先行词搭配，谓语 enters 也使用单数。
created by... 修饰 smoke，used in the region 修饰 cooking fires，形成层层后置修饰。
主语中心词 levels 为复数但原文谓语写作 serves，属于源文主谓不一致，已保留。

sentences.sentence: Restriction of human activity on lakes such as this, caused by the infestation of water hyacinth has enormous implications; villages such as Kayago, which is in close proximity to the lake, are often almost completely dependent on fishing activity for their economy and food source.
sentences.translation: 水葫芦成灾导致这类湖泊上的人类活动受限，影响极其巨大；卡亚戈等靠近湖泊的村庄，其经济和食物来源往往几乎完全依赖捕鱼。

structure.text: Restriction of human activity on lakes such as this
caused by the infestation of water hyacinth
which is in close proximity to the lake
are often almost completely dependent on fishing activity for their economy and food source

difficult_points: caused by... 修饰 Restriction；原文在该修饰语后缺少逗号，句子仍按原样保留。
分号后是完整分句，which 补充说明 Kayago 靠近湖泊。
be dependent on... for... 表示村庄在经济和食物两方面依赖捕鱼。

sentences.sentence: While the infestation of water hyacinth in Lake Victoria at the time of writing stands at 0.5%, far below the 10% level experienced in the middle of the 1990s, experts fear that growth could once again become out of control.
sentences.translation: 撰写本文时，维多利亚湖的水葫芦侵染面积为0.5%，远低于20世纪90年代中期的10%；尽管如此，专家仍担心其生长会再次失控。

structure.text: While the infestation of water hyacinth in Lake Victoria at the time of writing stands at 0.5%
far below the 10% level experienced in the middle of the 1990s
that growth could once again become out of control

difficult_points: While 引导让步从句，表示当前比例虽低，仍不能排除失控风险。
experienced... 是过去分词短语修饰 the 10% level。
fear 后 that 从句中 growth 指水葫芦种群增长，become out of control 表示再次失控。

sentences.sentence: The main concern is that, as a result of changing weather conditions, the activity of the snout beetle weevils may be less effective than in the past.
sentences.translation: 主要担忧是，天气条件变化可能使象鼻甲虫的活动不如过去有效。

structure.text: that, as a result of changing weather conditions, the activity of the snout beetle weevils may be less effective than in the past
as a result of changing weather conditions

difficult_points: that 引导表语从句，说明 main concern 的具体内容。
as a result of... 是插入的原因状语；less effective than 构成比较，比较对象是过去的活动效果。

expressions.text: less effective than in the past

sentences.sentence: The region around Lake Victoria has experienced an extended period of drought and while the water hyacinth is capable of living and reproducing both in lakes and surrounding dry land, its predator, the snout beetle can only survive on water.
sentences.translation: 维多利亚湖周边地区经历了长期干旱；水葫芦既能在湖中生活繁殖，也能在周围旱地生存，而它的天敌象鼻甲虫却只能在水上存活。

structure.text: has experienced an extended period of drought
and while the water hyacinth is capable of living and reproducing both in lakes and surrounding dry land

difficult_points: and 后的 while 从句与主句形成能力对比：植物适应水陆，昆虫只能依水生存。
both... and... 连接 lakes 与 surrounding dry land 两类生境。
the snout beetle 是 its predator 的同位语；原文其后缺逗号，已保留。

expressions.text: be capable of living and reproducing

sentences.sentence: Plant populations growing in lakeside locations are therefore under limited threat from the insect brought in to control them and are consequently able to reproduce in relative freedom.
sentences.translation: 因此，生长在湖边的水葫芦种群受到这种引入防治昆虫的威胁十分有限，因而能够相对自由地繁殖。

structure.text: are therefore under limited threat from the insect
and are consequently able to reproduce in relative freedom

difficult_points: growing... 修饰 populations，brought in... 则修饰 insect。
them 回指 Plant populations；therefore 与 consequently 串联前因后果。
under limited threat 表示所受威胁较小，in relative freedom 表示缺少天敌限制。
